zh.lifeSummary: Madach first Earl of Athol是Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl和Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer的兒子，於1085年出生在英國蘇格蘭。他於1129年與Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1152年之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Madach first Earl of Athol是Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl和Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer的儿子，于1085年出生在英国苏格兰。他于1129年与Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1152年之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: first
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of Fürst (see Furst ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): artificial name from Yiddish first ‘prince’.
Slovenian and Croatian (Firšt): nickname from firšt ‘prince’, an archaic or dialect loanword from German Fürst (see Furst and above).

variants.name: Furst
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Eugen, Kurt, Gunter, Hans, Herta, Maximilian, Ulrich.

German and Swiss German (Fürst): nickname from Old High German furisto ‘the first, most noble one’, a cognate of Old English fyrest ‘first, foremost’. The surname Fürst is also found elsewhere in central Europe, e.g. in Czechia and Slovenia. Compare Feerst , Fierce , Fierst , First , and Fuerst .
Jewish (Ashkenazic; Fürst): artificial name from German Fürst ‘prince’. Compare Fuerst .

nameMeanings.name: Earl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English e(o)rl ‘earl’, a traditional English title of nobility equivalent in rank to French and Norman Count .

variants.name: Earle
meanings: English: variant of   Earl  .

variants.name: Harle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Johann, Kurt.
South German (Härle): nickname from a diminutive of Middle High German hār ‘hair’.

English (northern) and Scottish: habitational name from Kirkharle and Little Harle in Northumberland (earlier simply Herle, Harle), possibly named from an Old English personal name Herela (a derivative of various compound names with the first element here ‘army’) + Old English lēah ‘wood, clearing’.

variants.name: Earls
meanings: English: variant of Earl with genitival -s, denoting someone who was a member of an earl's household, or, with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Ireland, when this is not the English name, it is from Gaelic Mac an Iarla ‘son of the earl’.

variants.name: Hearl
meanings: English: variant of Earl with prosthetic H-.

variants.name: Count
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French counte ‘count’ (Old French conte, from Latin comes, comitem); a title of French and Norman nobility, ranking as equivalent to English Earl .

variants.name: Earll
meanings: English (Kent): variant of   Earl  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.
Korean: variant of   O  .
Japanese: variant of Ō (see O ).

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Athol
meanings: Scottish: A male name derived from Athol, in Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: Madach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Leib, Yosef.
Jewish: artificial name from Hebrew malach ‘angel’.

en.lifeSummary: Madach first Earl of Athol was born in 1085, in Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl and Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer. He married Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess in 1129, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died before 1152, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Madach first Earl of Athol est né en 1085, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fils de Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl et Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer. Il a épousé Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess en 1129, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé avant 1152, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Madach first Earl of Athol wurde 1085 in Schottland, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl und Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer geboren. Er hat 1129 in Schottland, United Kingdom Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb vor 1152 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Madach first Earl of Athol è nato il nel 1085 nel Scozia, Regno Unito come figlio di Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl e Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer. Lui sposato Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess nel 1129, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì prima del 1152, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Madach first Earl of Atholは1085年にイギリススコットランドでMael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of AthollとMrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaerの息子として生まれた。1129年にイギリススコットランドでMargaret Haakonsdater Countess Countessと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1152年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Madach first Earl of Athol(은)는 1085년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl(와)과 Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1129년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1152년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Madach first Earl of Athol nasceu em 1085, em Escócia, United Kingdom filho de Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl e Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer. Ele casou-se com Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess em 1129, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 1152, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Madach first Earl of Athol родился в 1085 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl и Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess в 1129 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер перед 1152 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Madach first Earl of Athol nació en 1085, en Escocia, Reino Unido como hijo de Mael Muire Mac Donnchad Mormaer of Atholl y Mrs Mael Muir Mac Donnchad Mormaer. Se casó con Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess en 1129, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió antes de 1152, en su pueblo.
